advisoryExceptions.packageChain: Vite and React build tooling to @babel/core
advisoryExceptions.compensatingControl: Production audit and SBOM exclude development tooling; the locked compiler is used only during controlled builds.
Netlify CLI is development and CI tooling only; production functions and browser bundles do not contain this chain.

advisoryExceptions.packageChain: netlify-cli to fastify and vite-plugin-pwa to workbox-build, then ajv or fast-json-stringify to fast-uri
advisoryExceptions.compensatingControl: The affected parser is confined to local and CI build tooling; production audit, SBOM, function bundles and browser artifacts exclude it.

review.reason: Review all development-only advisory exceptions monthly. No production advisory or Critical advisory is accepted. High exceptions must be time-bounded, development-only and unreachable from production.
